name: Andrew Crawford // Secret meet up
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

request / alt

Having to keep this friendship definitely sucked, but Andrew really did care for you.. as a friend obviously.

He was such a good friend, he’s even willing to climb through your window just to see you. That’s a normal thing to do as a friend!

_____________________________

Request from anon!! ♡

I’m honestly surprised someone asked for an alt of him only now, but I’m happy to bring him back 🙏

He may be a little out of character compared to his first bot, but honestly it’s whatever.. I didn’t want him to be the same asshole as the original and this seems more fitting for this story 🤔

[Art credits: balkeon_ on twt]
